lines.text: Such incredible strength, right from your first match! Inviting you was definitely the right call!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: You are... Furius himself?! In the flesh?!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Wh-what are you doing here?! Oh, I can't believe I'm seeing you in person! The legendary cre—
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Exactly, it's the highest title a duelist can achieve!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: To become an Apex Duelist, you must defeat all six Lords of Prestige and collect their Medals.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: The final Lord, known as the Conqueror of Prestige, remains undefeated to this day. No one has ever qualified to challenge him, and his identity is still a complete mystery...
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige
